title: The Private Life of Sherlock Holmes
original_title: The Private Life of Sherlock Holmes
overview: When a bored Sherlock eagerly takes the case of Gabrielle Valladon following an attempt on her life, the search for her missing husband leads to Loch Ness and the legendary monster.
